Title: Chief AI Officer
Description:
Chief AI Officer

Location: Flexible (Hybrid/Remote)

Position Overview

Vortex Legal has been retained by an AmLaw firm to identify a visionary Chief AI Officer who will lead the firm's enterprise artificial intelligence strategy and oversee the responsible adoption of AI technologies across legal and business operations.

Reporting directly to executive leadership, the Chief AI Officer will serve as a strategic advisor responsible for developing the firm's long-term AI vision while partnering with attorneys, administrative leadership, Information Technology, Innovation, Knowledge Management, Risk, and Practice Group leadership to deliver transformative business outcomes.

This executive will play a critical role in positioning the firm at the forefront of legal innovation through thoughtful governance, strategic implementation, and measurable business impact. As AI leadership becomes an increasingly important differentiator within the legal industry, firms are investing in executives capable of translating emerging technologies into practical solutions that enhance client service, attorney productivity, operational efficiency, and competitive advantage.

Key Responsibilities

Develop and execute the firm's enterprise AI strategy in alignment with business objectives.
Establish governance frameworks and policies for the responsible, ethical, and secure use of artificial intelligence.
Identify opportunities to leverage AI across legal practice, business operations, client service delivery, knowledge management, and administrative functions.
Partner with executive leadership to prioritize strategic AI investments and evaluate emerging technologies.
Lead cross-functional AI initiatives from concept through implementation and adoption.
Collaborate with Information Technology, Innovation, Knowledge Management, Risk Management, Information Security, and Practice Group leadership to ensure successful deployment of AI solutions.
Build and mentor a high-performing AI, innovation, and product team as the firm's AI capabilities continue to expand.
Develop KPIs and success metrics to measure adoption, utilization, operational efficiencies, and business value.
Serve as the firm's internal and external thought leader on AI strategy, governance, and innovation.
Monitor developments in generative AI, legal technology, regulatory requirements, and market trends to ensure the firm remains an industry leader.

Qualifications

Bachelor's degree required; JD, MBA, or advanced technical degree preferred.
10+ years of progressive leadership experience in AI, legal technology, innovation, digital transformation, product strategy, or enterprise technology.
Demonstrated success leading enterprise AI initiatives within a law firm, professional services organization, or complex enterprise environment.
Strong understanding of generative AI, large language models (LLMs), AI governance, machine learning applications, and emerging legal technology.
Experience presenting strategy and business cases to executive leadership and governing committees.
Exceptional leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence across all levels of an organization.
Proven ability to lead organizational change and enterprise-wide technology adoption initiatives.

Preferred Experience

Prior experience within an AmLaw firm or global professional services organization.
Experience overseeing AI governance, vendor selection, technology implementation, and enterprise change management.
Familiarity with legal workflows, knowledge management, document automation, and attorney-facing technology solutions.




Why This Opportunity

This is a rare executive opportunity to shape the future of AI within one of the nation's leading law firms. The successful candidate will have the ability to influence firm strategy, build a best-in-class AI program, and define how emerging technologies enhance both the practice and business of law for years to come.

Title: Founders Associate ($100k) at Ligo Biosciences
Description:
This is a job that Jill, our AI Recruiter, is recruiting for on behalf of one of our customers.

She will pick the best candidates from Jack's network.

The next step is to speak to Jack.

Job Title

Founders Associate

Salary

$100k

Company Description

Ligo Biosciences is a YC S24 biotech startup in San Francisco using generative AI to design novel enzymes at the intersection of biology and machine learning.

Job Description

As the Founders Associate at Ligo Biosciences, you will serve as the operational backbone and CEO’s right-hand. You'll tackle everything from setting up lab robotics and office design to managing investor relations and hiring logistics. This high-ownership role is designed for an adaptable generalist eager to build a fast-moving startup from the ground up.

Location

San Francisco, USA

Why this role is remarkable


Work directly with the founders of a YC S24 startup, gaining an unfiltered view into building a biotech company from the earliest stages.
Play a critical role in a company applying cutting-edge generative AI to solve complex biological problems with massive real-world impact.
Enjoy total ownership and autonomy with no bureaucracy, where your contributions directly shape the company's operational foundations and culture.


What You Will Do


Manage end-to-end office operations, including physical workspace design, hardware setup, and the coordination of specialized lab equipment and robotics.
Support the CEO with high-level strategic tasks such as fundraising material preparation, investor communications, and financial tracking.
Drive the company's growth by running point on hiring logistics, talent sourcing, and building essential internal processes from scratch.


The ideal candidate


Proven experience in fast-moving startup environments, operations, or program management with a track record of handling ambiguous, high-stakes projects.
A "no task is too small" mentality combined with the ability to switch between physical lab setup and executive-level coordination seamlessly.
Exceptional organizational skills and energy, thriving in a small-team setting where you act as the primary glue for all non-technical functions.


Who are Jack & Jill?

Ok, I'll go first. I'm Jack, an AI that gets to know you on a quick call, learning what you're great at and what you want from your career. Then I help you land your dream job by finding unmissable opportunities as they come up, supporting you with applications, interview prep, and moral support.

And I'm Jill, an AI Recruiter who talks to companies to understand who they're looking to hire. Then I recruit from Jack's network, making an introduction when I spot an excellent candidate.

How does this work?


Jack's an AI agent for job searching and career coaching. He works for you.
Jill is the AI recruiter working for the company. She recruits from Jack's network.
If it's a match and the company wants to meet you, they'll make the intro. In the meantime, if you'd like, Jack will send you excellent alternatives.


We never post fake jobs

This isn't a trick. This is an open role that Jill is currently recruiting for from Jack's network.

Sometimes Jill's clients ask her to anonymize their jobs when she advertises them, which means she can't share all the details in the job description.

We appreciate this can make them look a bit suspect, but there isn't much we can do about it.

Give Jack a spin! You could land this role. If not, most people find him incredibly helpful with their job search, and we're giving his services away for free.

Title: Founding Engineer ($120k-$300k + Equity) at Y/n
Description:
This is a job that Jill, our AI Recruiter, is recruiting for on behalf of one of our customers.

She will pick the best candidates from Jack's network.

The next step is to speak to Jack.

Job Title

Founding Engineer

Salary

$120k-$300k + Equity

Company Description

Y/n is a $14M seed-stage interactive storytelling platform backed by Sequoia Capital and Kleiner Perkins. Based in San Francisco, the app recently reached #4 in the App Store's books category, serving 100,000+ daily users and processing 2 trillion AI tokens monthly with a lean team of elite product builders.

Job Description

As the founding full-stack engineer at Y/n, you will spearhead the development of a next-generation entertainment machine. You’ll own major product surfaces and build high-scale personalized recommendation systems. Joining a team of three, you will directly influence the architectural future of an app already seeing massive viral growth and high engagement among global audiences.

Location

San Francisco, USA

Why this role is remarkable


Work alongside elite founders, including the researcher who trained the world’s first image-editing AI and the founding designer of Substack, in a high-velocity $14M seed-stage environment.
Experience extreme scale immediately, contributing to a platform already serving 200 million user messages per month and growing at a staggering 40% month-over-month rate.
Shape the future of digital entertainment by building the infrastructure that allows millions of users to create, share, and live within their own interactive narratives.


What You Will Do


Architect and scale the core infrastructure required to serve trillions of AI tokens and hundreds of millions of user messages monthly for a global user base.
Design and implement sophisticated personalized recommendation engines to connect users with the most relevant community-created interactive stories and fanfiction.
Lead end-to-end feature development across the full stack, maintaining high performance and reliability while owning significant portions of the product surface area.


The ideal candidate


Demonstrates deep experience building and managing production infrastructure from the ground up, with a track record of moving beyond simple platform-as-a-service deployments.
Brings a proven history of shipping meaningful products, either at high-growth startups or through significant, high-impact independent side projects that show a builder's mindset.
Possesses a genuine interest in fandom, reading, or storytelling culture, aligning with the company mission to create the most entertaining stories of the next century.
